---
title: "首页"
page-layout: full
toc: false
description: "在结构、谱与概率之间追踪数学。"
css:
  - assets/home.css
  - assets/quantum-network.css
include-after-body: assets/home-script.html
---

::: {.hero-viewport .quantum-field data-quantum-field="true" data-seed="1729"}
<div class="hero-aurora hero-aurora-one" aria-hidden="true"></div>
<div class="hero-aurora hero-aurora-two" aria-hidden="true"></div>

::: {.hero-inner}
::: {.hero-eyebrow}
<span class="signal-dot" aria-hidden="true"></span>
ACADEMIC SIGNAL / {{< var person.affiliation_zh >}}
:::

::: {.hero-grid}
::: {.hero-main data-network-safe="true"}
::: {.hero-name-block}
# {{< var person.name_zh >}} {#home-name}
:::

::: {.hero-name-en}
{{< var person.name_en >}}
:::

::: {.hero-role}
{{< var person.role_zh >}} / {{< var person.role_en >}}
:::

::: {.hero-statement}
在量子信息、量子图与场论之间，追踪结构、谱与物理。
:::

::: {.hero-statement-en}
Tracing structure, spectra, and physics across quantum theories.
:::

::: {.hero-actions}
[ENTER THE NOTES](notes.qmd){.button-primary}
[ABOUT ME](about.qmd){.button-ghost}
:::
:::

::: {.signal-card data-network-safe="true"}
<p class="signal-card-index">CURRENT SPECTRUM / 2026</p>

::: {.signal-row}
<span>01</span><strong>Quantum Information</strong>
:::
::: {.signal-row}
<span>02</span><strong>Quantum Mechanics</strong>
:::
::: {.signal-row}
<span>03</span><strong>Quantum Graphs</strong>
:::
::: {.signal-row}
<span>04</span><strong>Quantum Field Theory</strong>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.hero-scroll-cue aria-hidden="true"}
<span>SCROLL TO EXPLORE</span><i></i>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.spectral-section}
::: {.section-code}
01 / CURRENT ORBITS
:::

## 正在追踪的四条量子轨道

::: {.orbit-grid}
::: {.orbit-card .orbit-cyan}
::: {.orbit-number}
01
:::
### 量子信息

量子信道、量子态、信息结构及其数学表达。

<span class="orbit-symbol" aria-hidden="true">ρ</span>
:::

::: {.orbit-card .orbit-violet}
::: {.orbit-number}
02
:::
### 量子力学

Hilbert 空间、算符、动力学与量子系统的基本结构。

<span class="orbit-symbol" aria-hidden="true">H</span>
:::

::: {.orbit-card .orbit-blue}
::: {.orbit-number}
03
:::
### 量子图

有限维非交换图、量子邻接算子、连通性与谱信息。

<span class="orbit-symbol" aria-hidden="true">σ</span>
:::

::: {.orbit-card .orbit-magenta}
::: {.orbit-number}
04
:::
### 量子场论

场、对称性、表示与从量子力学走向场论的数学桥梁。

<span class="orbit-symbol" aria-hidden="true">φ</span>
:::
:::
:::

::: {.spectral-section .notes-portal}
::: {.section-code}
02 / OPEN ARCHIVE
:::

::: {.notes-portal-grid}
::: {.notes-portal-copy}
## 讲义不是终点，<br>是思考留下的轨迹。

这里归档我愿意公开的课程讲义、专题笔记与综述性材料。每份内容都会标注状态、版本与更新时间。
:::

::: {.notes-portal-action}
[EXPLORE ALL NOTES <span aria-hidden="true">↗</span>](notes.qmd){.portal-link}
:::
:::
:::

::: {.spectral-section .site-manifesto}
::: {.manifesto-mark aria-hidden="true"}
∿
:::

::: {.manifesto-copy}
<p class="manifesto-label">PERSONAL ACADEMIC ARCHIVE</p>

这个网站不是静态简历，而是一份会持续演化的数学档案：学习、修订、勘误，然后再次理解。
:::
:::
